items.name: Ivory Ronin Coat [PBR]
items.description:
✨⚔️ Pure elegance with a warrior’s soul.
This refined ivory coat blends ceremonial beauty with a battle-ready silhouette. Soft off-white fabric is accented by muted gold trims and layered folds, while the tied belt and blade detail add a subtle ronin-inspired edge—perfect for noble fighters, sages, or elite NPCs.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant ivory color with gold-accent detailing
Flowing layered design that looks natural in motion
Balanced mix of ceremonial, fantasy, and samurai aesthetics
Ideal for roleplay, RPG worlds, and premium avatar outfits
🔍 Keywords: robe, ronin coat, samurai outfit, fantasy clothing, ivory robe, warrior outfit, elegant coat, rpg outfit, anime style, roblox clothes
Graceful, powerful, and timeless—this piece elevates any avatar instantly.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: Vintage Earthtone Plaid Blazer [PBR]
items.description:
🧥✨ Classic tailoring with a worn-in, story-rich feel.
The Vintage Earthtone Plaid Blazer brings timeless elegance and subtle realism to your avatar wardrobe. Featuring a soft brown and beige plaid pattern, this blazer feels lived-in and authentic, as if it’s been part of countless journeys. The relaxed fit and classic lapel design make it perfect for casual roleplay, vintage aesthetics, detective styles, or everyday city outfits.
Its muted colors pair effortlessly with shirts, sweaters, and trousers, giving your avatar a mature, grounded presence.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Classic blazer silhouette with a relaxed, natural fit
Earthtone plaid pattern for a vintage, realistic look
Perfect for formal, casual, or roleplay outfits
Designed to blend seamlessly with modern or retro styles
🔍 Keywords: vintage blazer, plaid jacket, classic outfit, earth tone clothing, realistic Roblox clothes, roleplay fashion, formal jacket, casual blazer, PBR clothing, avatar fashion
